name: CivoProviderConnection
description: Civo cloud connection supporting inline and runner authentication modes.

fields.name: runner
fields.description: Slug of a RunnerRegistration. Required when auth_mode=runner.

fields.name: api_token
fields.description: Personal access token for Civo API. Required when auth_mode=inline.

fields.name: default_region
fields.description: Default Civo region (e.g. LON1, FRA1, NYC1).

fields.name: object_store_access_id
fields.description: Access Key ID for Civo Object Store (S3-compatible). Optional.

fields.name: object_store_secret_key
fields.description: Secret Key for Civo Object Store. Optional.
